title: Lemon Chicken
instructions: Combine chicken pieces and lemon juice in bowl and marinate overnight.
Drain chicken thoroughly and pat dry.
Fill a plastic bag with flour, salt, paprika, and pepper and shake well to mix.
Put 2 pieces of chicken in the bag at a time and shake, coating completely.
Heat corn oil in cast iron Dutch oven until hot.
Fry chicken pieces, a few at a time, until well browned and crisp, about 5 minutes on each side.
Arrange browned chicken in a single layer on a large baking sheet.
Sprinkle chicken with lemon zest and brown sugar.
Mix chicken stock and lemon extract together and pour around chicken pieces.
Set a thin lemon slice on the top of each piece of chicken.
Bake for 35 minutes or until tender.
notes: Can be served hot or cold
